form.formComment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 457m at Ascot Park (26.05), beating Jay Walker. Stay with him.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.66) in a Class 5 H, finishing a 10 length fourth. Box stats strong with three wins and two placings from seven starts. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Manawatu over 457m in 26.19 last start, beating Hey Driver. Has clocked a slick 30.15 Best Time here at the trip. Solid chance with even luck.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd in a Class 4 on April 14 over 457m at Manawatu behind Big Time Gunnar beaten 2.25 lengths (26.34). Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Right in the mix again.
